headline: Home Renovations Preparation Checklist — Burbank
articleBody:
Home Renovations Preparation Checklist for Burbank Clients

Before your Home Renovations appointment with Opus Builders, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Measurements
2. Budget
3. Design preferences
4. Permits needed
5. Material selections

Contact Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 to get started.
